##NAMES=Cerite-(CeCa)
##RRUFFID=R130614
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(Ce_7_Ca_2_)[box]Mg(SiO_4_)_3_(SiO_3_OH)_4_(OH)_3_
##LOCALITY=Mont Saint-Hilaire, Rouville County, Quebec, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Don Doell
##DESCRIPTION=Hexagonal platy pink crystals, associated with catapleiite and aegirine. The color is dependent upon light source.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130614
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 10.862 b: 10.862 c: 38.346 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 3918 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
